purpose: Stateful Button — visually shows pressed/unpressed state. Used for binary toggles that aren't pure switches (e.g. format toolbar bold/italic, filter chip on/off).
whenToUse: Filter mode toggle in a toolbar
When state must be visually distinct from disabled
doRules: Show pressed state via fill, not just text
dontRules: Do not use without a clear pressed/unpressed visual distinction
Do not stack multiple ToggleButtons that are actually mutually exclusive — use SegmentedButton

layoutGuidance.placement: Place ToggleButton inside a compatible container (OverflowToolbar, Toolbar, Form).
layoutGuidance.sizing: Auto width unless explicitly sized; height matches density (Compact 26-32px, Cozy 36-44px).
layoutGuidance.spacing: 8px gap from adjacent elements; 16px between groups.

contentGuidance.labelLength: See doRules for specific length guidance.

responsiveBehavior.M: May condense — see Fiori responsive design guidelines.
responsiveBehavior.S: May convert to alternative pattern on narrow viewports.

accessibilityGuidance.ariaPattern: Maps to ARIA pattern appropriate for button.
accessibilityGuidance.keyboard: Full keyboard support — Tab to focus, Enter/Space to activate.

exceptions: See pluginNotes for plugin-specific rendering caveats.
